creator: groot@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 170044
misc updates patch, split qbs / qtcreator

These are updates from area51, the KDE-FreeBSD staging area. It's the last big thing to be done to qt-5.5, preparing structures for the eventual update to qt-5.6.

 - splits qbs (Qt Build System) off of qtcreator
 - update qtcreator
 - platform and themes updates
 - add qtdesignerplugin to the python port

Work by rakuco, tcberner and Ralf Nolden.
